creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
----Security_Multipart(Tue_Dec__6_01_38_33_2011_844)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

"Mikhail T." <mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com> wrote
  in <4EBCB592.2030608@aldan.algebra.com>:

mi> Ok, the problem here is not with the ffmpeg itself, but, rather with
mi> the librtmp.pc, that's installed by the rtmpdump-port: it lists
mi> packages libssl and libcrypto as dependencies, even though on FreeBSD
mi> there are no libssl.pc and libcrypto.pc installed.
mi>
mi> The rtmpdump needs fixing like this:
mi>
mi>    --- Makefile    23 Sep 2011 22:24:20 -0000      1.9
mi>    +++ Makefile    11 Nov 2011 05:36:25 -0000
mi>    @@ -8,3 +8,3 @@
mi>      PORTVERSION=   2.3
mi>    -PORTREVISION=  1
mi>    +PORTREVISION=  2
mi>      CATEGORIES=    multimedia net
mi>    --- files/patch-librtmp-librtmp.pc.in   19 Jan 2011 01:58:24
mi>    -0000      1.1
mi>    +++ files/patch-librtmp-librtmp.pc.in   11 Nov 2011 05:36:25 -0000
mi>    @@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
mi>    ---- librtmp/librtmp.pc.in.orig 2010-07-01 04:58:34.000000000 +0900
mi>    +--- librtmp/librtmp.pc.in      2010-07-01 04:58:34.000000000 +0900
mi>      +++ librtmp/librtmp.pc.in      2011-01-05 23:29:34.000000000 +0900
mi>    -@@ -8,5 +8,5 @@
mi>    +@@ -8,5 +8,4 @@
mi>       Version: @VERSION@
mi>    - Requires: @CRYPTO_REQ@
mi>    +-Requires: @CRYPTO_REQ@
mi>       URL: http://rtmpdump.mplayerhq.hu

 Can you show me your installed libdata/pkgconfig/librtmp.pc?
 @CRYPTO_REQ@ should be replaced with "", so removing Requires: line
 will make no difference.  I want to know if you have something like
 "Requires: foo" in librtmp.pc.

-- Hiroki
